name: font-cleartype
desc: Upgrade the two LOGH VII CreateFontA call sites from ANTIALIASED_QUALITY (4) to CLEARTYPE_QUALITY (5). This pairs with font-face.json for the primary UI cache and font-atlas-face.json for the D3D texture-glyph atlas, so both CreateFontA paths use Pretendard before quality is raised. RE: FUN_004aec70 and FUN_004b0960 both pass quality via `push 4`; GDI probes confirmed HANGEUL_CHARSET face resolution is runtime-dependent and must be verified live.
verified: ENCODED (two 2-byte same-length immediate patches). originalHex byte-verified against the current canonical playable/client EXE before writing. Needs live visual confirmation in the real client after rebuilding/deploying.
